wine_retailers.name: Vinothek Thal Wachau
wine_retailers.address: Wachaustraße 242, 3610 Weißenkirchen in der Wachau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Grüner Veltliner and Riesling from 14 Weißenkirchen member winegrowers; all three Vinea Wachau classifications
wine_retailers.description: The communal wine shop of 14 Weißenkirchen growers, open April to October. A rotating daily producer pours samples free of charge, making this the best-value Wachau tasting stop without advance booking.

wine_retailers.name: W.E.R.O. Wine Shop
wine_retailers.address: Marktstraße 5, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Artisanal Vinea Wachau Grüner Veltliner and Riesling from six curated small producers
wine_retailers.description: A stylish wine boutique on Spitz's main street curating bottles exclusively from six Wachau artisan producers. Open most days of the week with walk-in sampling; focused on authentic, quality-driven natural Wachau whites.

wine_retailers.name: Weinhimmel Wein & Genuss
wine_retailers.address: Untere Landstraße 35, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Over 200 Austrian and select international wines; Wachau, Kremstal, Kamptal specialists
wine_retailers.description: A wine boutique and shop in central Krems with more than 200 bottles available for purchase and tasting. Strong on Wachau Grüner Veltliner and Riesling from small producers; knowledgeable advisory service by winemaker Wolfgang Gansdorfer.

verified.address_quoted: Untere Landstraße 35, 3500 Krems an der Donau

wine_retailers.name: Vinothek Wein und Wachau
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Wachau, Kremstal and Kamptal independent producers; quality-and-regionality buying philosophy
wine_retailers.description: Rudolf Gottwald's independent Vinothek at the western entrance to the Wachau in Melk, celebrating 25 years in 2024. Purchases exclusively from the immediate region; the ideal bottle shop for arriving visitors or departing wine tourists.

wine_retailers.name: Winzer Krems Sandgrube 13 Shop
wine_retailers.address: Sandgrube 13, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Kremstal and Wachau cooperative range; Grüner Veltliner, Riesling, Zweigelt from member growers
wine_retailers.description: The flagship shop of Winzer Krems, the largest wine cooperative in Lower Austria. Over 50 labels from the cooperative's member growers available to taste and buy, with the premium Sandgrube 13 quality-tier selections.

wine_retailers.name: Weingut Stadt Krems Farm Shop
wine_retailers.address: Stadtgraben 11, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Kremstal Grüner Veltliner and Riesling from the city-owned winery operating since 1452
wine_retailers.description: The cellar shop of Weingut Stadt Krems, one of the oldest continuously active wineries in the world. Fritz Miesbauer focuses the range on Grüner Veltliner and Riesling; guided tastings are offered on selected weekday and Saturday slots.

wine_retailers.name: Domäne Wachau Vinothek Shop
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Full Domäne Wachau range: Grüner Veltliner and Riesling in all three Vinea Wachau classifications, plus apricot brandy and regional specialties at cellar-door prices
wine_retailers.description: The farm-gate shop beneath the baroque Kellerschlössel at Domäne Wachau. Priced at cellar-door rates and stocking the complete estate range including premium single-vineyard Smaragd bottlings. EV charging and parking on site.

wine_retailers.name: Bailoni Steinertor Shop
wine_retailers.address: Schwedengasse 2, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Wachauer Marillenlikör, triple-distilled Marillenbrand, Marillenfrizzante and specialty apricot products from Austria's first apricot distillery
wine_retailers.description: The Steinertor retail outlet of Bailoni, the first Wachau apricot distillery, founded 1872 in Krems-Stein. The full spirits, liqueur and frizzante range plus seasonal apricot dumplings and cake from the in-store Apricot Lounge.

wine_retailers.name: Wieser Wachau Farm Shop - Wösendorf
wine_retailers.address: Hauptstraße 13, 3610 Wösendorf in der Wachau, Austria
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Wachauer Marille schnapps, apricot eau-de-vie, liqueur, jams, roasted-apricot-kernel coffee and natural cosmetics direct from the farm distillery
wine_retailers.description: The headquarters farm shop of Wieser Wachau GmbH in Wösendorf, with additional outlets in Dürnstein and Krems. The premium apricot distillate range and artisanal specialty products available at source; an essential Wachau apricot-culture stop.

wine_retailers.name: Weingut Stift Göttweig Farm-Gate Shop
wine_retailers.wine_focus: Grüner Veltliner, Riesling and Pinot Noir from the 900-year-old Benedictine monastery estate
wine_retailers.description: The farm-gate sales room of Weingut Stift Göttweig, open Monday to Friday. The full range of abbey wines from Kremstal vineyards is available to taste at EUR 1 per sample; purchases waive tasting fees. Historic cellar beneath a UNESCO-listed Baroque abbey dating to 1083.
